instruction: 找到蓝色柱形商品，较细的。三个中任意一个都可以。

input.prompt:
You are the navigation brain for an embodied agent in a standalone retail shelf scene. Choose exactly one next navigation action from allowed_actions. Use MoveAhead to approach visible targets, RotateLeft/RotateRight to turn, LookUp/LookDown to adjust camera pitch. Use Done only under the termination_policy in the JSON payload: the requested object must be clearly found, visually confirmable, and sufficiently centered or close. Return JSON only.
{"instruction": "找到蓝色柱形商品，较细的。三个中任意一个都可以。", "allowed_actions": ["MoveAhead", "RotateLeft", "RotateRight", "LookUp", "LookDown", "Done"], "navigation_history": [], "scene_context": {"scene": "standalone_store_shelf_fbx", "shelf_asset": "/Users/yuaay/Documents/Embodied_AI/store-shelves/source/grocery_shelf.fbx", "target": "blue thin cylindrical product; any one of the visible candidates is acceptable"}, "termination_policy": {"done_when": "At least one matching target instance is clearly visible and identifiable, and it is near the image center or large enough in the image for stable confirmation.", "target_match": "For this task, any one blue, thin, cylindrical product instance is sufficient.", "not_required": "Do not require pickup, perfect alignment, or interaction distance for this find-only task.", "continue_when": "If the target is only peripheral, too small, heavily occluded, or ambiguous with a blue box/book, continue with MoveAhead, RotateLeft/RotateRight, LookUp, or LookDown."}}

model_output.rationale: The blue cylindrical products are visible, but positioned to the right. Rotating right will align better with the target.
model_output.raw_text: {"action":"RotateRight","confidence":0.8,"rationale":"The blue cylindrical products are visible, but positioned to the right. Rotating right will align better with the target."}
